summary: Complete testing of AI Village backlog features including travel distance tracking, PvP combat system, time phase system, mood-based dialogue, and frontend UI pages. All 17 backend tests passed and all frontend pages load correctly.

issues: Day/night visual overlay is subtle - may need more pronounced color shifts for clarity during dangerous phases

passed_tests: POST /api/character/{id}/move - sprint moves faster (2x speed multiplier)
POST /api/character/{id}/move - returns discoveries field for land discovery
POST /api/pvp/challenge - creates PvP challenge between players in same location
POST /api/pvp/challenge - correctly rejects challenges when players in different locations
POST /api/pvp/{id}/accept - accepts challenge and puts both players in combat
POST /api/pvp/{id}/attack - executes attack with damage calculation, stamina cost, critical hits
GET /api/pvp/active/{character_id} - returns active PvP session status
POST /api/time/phase - returns current time phase with danger level (0-1 scale)
POST /api/time/phase - works with different timezone offsets
GET /api/villagers/{id}/dialogue - returns mood-based dialogue with tone
GET /api/villagers/{id}/dialogue - supports greeting, trade, farewell dialogue types
GET /api/villagers/{id}/dialogue - returns trade availability info (will_trade, trade_modifier)
Full PvP combat flow - challenge, accept, attack, victory works end-to-end
frontend_tests_passed: Homepage loads correctly with Enter The Echoes button
Auth/Login page works with username input
Character creation page loads with all options (background, traits, appearance)
Inventory page loads with combat stats, equipped gear, available weapons (7 types), available armor (6 types), exploration progress
Guilds page loads with available guilds, create guild button, guild types (5 types with bonuses)
Play page (FirstPersonView) loads with HP/Stamina bars, d-pad controls, combat buttons, location display
Pause menu shows time phase (MORNING), danger level (10%), and navigation options
Multiplayer Chat component opens with channel selector, message input, send button
critical_code_review_comments: Travel distance tracking correctly accumulates distance_moved for each move
Land discoveries trigger at specified distances: eastern_plains(500), western_forest(600), northern_mountains(750), southern_coast(800)
PvP combat does NOT have permadeath - loser is set to 1 HP instead of 0
PvP winner receives 50 XP on victory
Time phases have proper danger levels: morning/afternoon(0.1), dawn(0.2), dusk(0.3), pre_dawn(0.5), night(0.7), witching_hour(1.0)
Day/night overlay in FirstPersonView uses CSS gradient classes for different phases
Mood-based dialogue system has 6 mood types with different dialogue templates
seed_data_creation: Created test character 'Sirix_Test_Hero' (ID: d70e5d9e-7e08-47bf-80cd-2b185abe0d71) for frontend testing. Test users/characters created with TEST_ prefix pattern in backend tests.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All backlog features tested and working: 1) Travel distance tracking with auto land discovery at 500/600/750/800 units. 2) Full PvP system: challenge->accept->attack->victory (no permadeath, loser gets 1 HP). 3) Time phase system with 7 phases and danger levels. 4) Mood-based dialogue with 6 moods and 3 dialogue types. 5) Frontend pages all functional: inventory shows 7 weapons/6 armors, guilds shows 5 types with bonuses, play page has combat UI and day/night overlay.
